label: Purchase Agreement
description: The fields any residential purchase agreement needs, mapped to auto-fill core keys where they apply. Position-FREE: a specific layout supplies coordinates via recognition (known_forms) or guided vision per upload.

fields.label: effective_date
fields.note: FORM 300 effective_date = offer/effective date of agreement.

fields.label: listing_agent
fields.note: FORM 300 listing_agent name. core_key nulled: listing agent is the counterparty, not the RTF user (no scalar collision with buyer_agent).

fields.label: listing_agent_of_seller
fields.note: FORM 300 agency role: listing agent represents seller.

fields.label: listing_transaction_facilitator
fields.note: FORM 300 agency role: listing transaction facilitator.

fields.label: listing_dual_agent
fields.note: FORM 300 agency role: listing dual agent.

fields.label: buyer_agent_of_buyer
fields.note: FORM 300 agency role: buyer agent represents buyer.

fields.label: buyer_transaction_facilitator
fields.note: FORM 300 agency role: buyer transaction facilitator.

fields.label: buyer_dual_agent
fields.note: FORM 300 agency role: buyer dual agent.

fields.label: Buyer_broker_comp_checkbox
fields.note: FORM 300 buyer broker comp election checkbox. core_key nulled: election checkbox, not the comp value (buyer_broker_comp_percentage carries it).

fields.label: buyer_sale_contingency_not
fields.note: FORM 300 buyer sale-of-property contingency IS NOT.

fields.label: warranty_does_not
fields.note: FORM 300 home warranty: does not furnish.

fields.label: warranty_paid_by_seller
fields.note: FORM 300 home warranty paid by seller.

fields.label: warranty_paid_by_buyer
fields.note: FORM 300 home warranty paid by buyer.

fields.label: paint_attached_yes
fields.note: FORM 300 lead-based paint disclosure attached: yes.

fields.label: paint_attached_no
fields.note: FORM 300 lead-based paint disclosure attached: no.

fields.label: contingent_upon_inspection_and_repairs
fields.note: FORM 300 inspection: contingent upon inspection and repairs.

fields.label: contingent_upon_inspection_no_repair
fields.note: FORM 300 inspection: contingent upon inspection, no repair.

fields.label: buyer_title_expense
fields.note: FORM 300 title expense paid by buyer.

fields.label: seller_title_expense
fields.note: FORM 300 title expense paid by seller.

fields.label: property_state
fields.note: Universal PA concept missing from FORM 300; from Baldwin REALTORS (property_state) + ValleyMLS (property_state). FORM 300 captures city/county/zip but not state.

fields.label: acceptance_binding_date
fields.note: Universal binding/acceptance date distinct from offer date; from Baldwin REALTORS (acceptance_date). FORM 300 has only effective_date.

fields.label: earnest_money_holder
fields.note: Universal earnest-money escrow holder; from ValleyMLS (earnest_money_holder) + Baldwin REALTORS (holder elections). FORM 300 captures amount only.

fields.label: loan_type_usda
fields.note: Universal loan-type option; from Baldwin REALTORS (loan_type_usda). FORM 300 lacks a USDA checkbox.

fields.label: included_fixtures
fields.note: Universal personal-property / fixtures-conveying field; from Baldwin REALTORS (personal_property_conveying / itemized_fixtures). FORM 300 has no free-text fixtures field.

fields.label: additional_provisions
fields.note: Universal additional-provisions / special-stipulations text; from ValleyMLS (additional_provisions). FORM 300 has no general provisions field in the kept set.

fields.label: title_vesting_names
fields.note: Universal manner-of-taking-title / vesting names; from Baldwin REALTORS (title_vesting_names). FORM 300 kept set has no vesting-names field.

fields.label: time_to_respond_date
fields.note: Universal offer-expiration / time-to-respond deadline date; from Baldwin REALTORS (time_to_respond_date). FORM 300 kept set lacks it.

fields.label: time_to_respond_time
fields.note: Universal offer-expiration time of day; from Baldwin REALTORS (time_to_respond_time).

fields.label: buyer1_signature
fields.note: Universal buyer signature; from Baldwin REALTORS (buyer1_signature) + ValleyMLS (purchaser_signature_1). FORM 300 kept set has no signature fields.

fields.label: buyer1_signature_date
fields.note: Universal buyer signature date; from Baldwin REALTORS (buyer1_signature_date) + ValleyMLS (purchaser_date_1).

fields.label: buyer1_print_name
fields.note: Universal buyer printed name at signature; from Baldwin REALTORS (buyer1_print_name).

fields.label: buyer2_signature
fields.note: Universal second-buyer signature; from Baldwin REALTORS (buyer2_signature) + ValleyMLS (purchaser_signature_2).

fields.label: buyer2_signature_date
fields.note: Universal second-buyer signature date; from Baldwin REALTORS (buyer2_signature_date).

fields.label: buyer2_print_name
fields.note: Universal second-buyer printed name; from Baldwin REALTORS (buyer2_print_name).

fields.label: seller1_signature
fields.note: Universal seller signature; from Baldwin REALTORS (seller1_signature) + ValleyMLS (seller_signature_1).

fields.label: seller1_signature_date
fields.note: Universal seller signature date; from Baldwin REALTORS (seller1_signature_date) + ValleyMLS (seller_date_1).

fields.label: seller1_print_name
fields.note: Universal seller printed name; from Baldwin REALTORS (seller1_print_name).

fields.label: seller2_signature
fields.note: Universal second-seller signature; from Baldwin REALTORS (seller2_signature) + ValleyMLS (seller_signature_2).

fields.label: seller2_signature_date
fields.note: Universal second-seller signature date; from Baldwin REALTORS (seller2_signature_date).

fields.label: seller2_print_name
fields.note: Universal second-seller printed name; from Baldwin REALTORS (seller2_print_name).

fields.label: buyer_brokerage_name
fields.note: Buyer-side brokerage = the RTF agent's firm (buy-side); auto-fills from the deal. Added by completeness critic.

fields.label: listing_brokerage_name
fields.note: Listing-side (counterparty) brokerage; manual. Added by completeness critic.

fields.label: down_payment_amount
fields.note: ValleyMLS has explicit down payment / balance-due-at-closing distinct from loan_amount and price. FORM 300 lacks it.

fields.label: loan_percent
fields.note: FORM 300 lets financing be expressed as a % of purchase price as an alternative to loan_amount. Same core_key (loan_amount_or_pct).

fields.label: finance_application_days
fields.note: FORM 300 'within ___ days' to apply for financing. Mid-sentence numeric blank.

fields.label: inspection_period_days
fields.note: FORM 300 inspection contingency 'within ___ calendar days' period. Mid-sentence numeric blank.

fields.label: seller_repair_response_days
fields.note: FORM 300 days for seller to respond to repair requests.

fields.label: buyer_repair_response_days
fields.note: FORM 300 days for buyer to respond after seller repair response.

fields.label: agent_email
fields.note: Buyer agent email on FORM 300 agent block. Filled at signing, not auto-filled.

fields.label: agent_phone
fields.note: Buyer agent phone on FORM 300 agent block.

fields.label: agent_license
fields.note: Buyer agent license number on FORM 300 agent block.

fields.label: company_license
fields.note: Buyer brokerage/company license number on FORM 300 agent block.

fields.label: office_address
fields.note: Buyer brokerage office address on FORM 300 agent block.

fields.label: listing_agent_email
fields.note: Listing (counterparty) agent email; agent fills if known. Manual.

fields.label: listing_agent_phone
fields.note: Listing (counterparty) agent phone; agent fills if known. Manual.

fields.label: lot
fields.note: ValleyMLS breaks legal description into Lot/Block/Subdivision/Addition. Lot sub-field.

fields.label: witness1_signature
fields.note: ValleyMLS + Inspection Addendum use witness signature lines. FORM 300 does not. New Witness role.

label: Wire Fraud Advisory
description: Wire-fraud advisory/notice acknowledged and signed by the consumer(s).

fields.label: consumer_name
fields.note: First buyer/seller printed name. core_key buyer_name when buyer-side; agent picks side.

label: Real Estate Brokerage Services Disclosure
description: AREC Real Estate Brokerage Services Disclosure — licensee + consumer acknowledgement of the agency relationship.

fields.label: consumer_name
fields.note: Name of Consumer. Side picked by agent.

label: Documentation Fee Agreement
description: Brokerage documentation / transaction-fee agreement signed by the client(s).

fields.label: property_address
fields.note: Property address at top. core_key not set (brokerage form, not standard PA address field).

label: Inspection Addendum
description: Inspection-contingency addendum to a residential purchase agreement.

fields.label: witness1
fields.note: Witness line (plain text, no signing role).

label: Lead-Based Paint Disclosure
description: Federal lead-based paint disclosure & acknowledgement for pre-1978 housing (seller discloses, buyer acknowledges).

label: Buyer Agency Agreement
description: Exclusive buyer agency / representation agreement between the buyer(s) and the brokerage.

fields.label: disclose_identity
fields.note: Para 10 does/does not disclose buyer identity.

label: Contingency for Sale of Buyer's Property Addendum
description: Addendum making the purchase contingent on the sale of the buyer's existing property.

fields.label: buyer_property_address
fields.note: Buyer's property to be sold, located at.

fields.label: listing_broker_name
fields.note: Listing broker name/license for buyer's property.

label: Listing Agreement
description: Exclusive right-to-sell residential listing agreement between the seller(s) and the listing brokerage.

fields.label: seller_name
fields.note: Owner(s)/Seller(s) - 'made by and between ___'. Auto-fills seller name.

fields.label: dual_agency_authorized
fields.note: AGENCY: Seller does/does not authorize Listing Broker as Dual Agent.

fields.label: mls_input_date
fields.note: Para 1 'place listing into MLS on ___' date.

fields.label: listing_price
fields.note: 2.A Listing Price $___. Maps to purchase_price core key (listing context).

fields.label: home_warranty
fields.note: 5 Seller shall/shall not furnish Home Warranty.

fields.label: termite_prior_infestation
fields.note: 8 Seller is/is not aware of previous infestation.

fields.label: termite_under_contract
fields.note: 8 Property is/is not covered by repair/re-treatment contract.

fields.label: has_survey
fields.note: 9 Seller does/does not have a Survey.

fields.label: has_elevation_cert
fields.note: 9 Seller does/does not have Elevation Certificate.

fields.label: lead_paint_required
fields.note: 10 check if Lead Paint disclosure must be provided (pre-1978).

fields.label: locks_linens_convey
fields.note: 14 locks/linens are/are not seller property and will/will not convey.

fields.label: title_type
fields.note: 15 Deeded / Fairhope Single Tax Corporation group.

fields.label: has_poa
fields.note: 16 Property is/is not part of a Property Owners Association.

fields.label: seller1_print_name
fields.note: Seller 1 print name as title is held.

fields.label: listing_agent_print_name
fields.note: Listing Agent print name. Auto-fills agent name.

fields.label: seller_initials_per_page
fields.note: FORM-SPECIFIC: 'Seller's Initials' block appears on EVERY page (~13 pages). Place one per page. Tiered common but keep as repeated per-page placement, not vision-hunt clutter.

label: Addendum
description: Generic addendum / amendment to an underlying real estate agreement.

fields.label: effective_date
fields.note: Date the addendum / underlying agreement is dated.

fields.label: property_address
fields.note: Property address this addendum pertains to.

fields.label: addendum_text
fields.note: Main addendum body / additional terms block (multiline). The core of a generic addendum.
